character_summary: Shrine maiden who can communicate with the Dragon God to give weather forecasts. Cheerful and hardworking but loses confidence after forecasts keep failing.
other_characters: 市民 (Citizen) - female townsperson who does laundry
踊り子 (Dancer) - female dancer/prostitute who hangs costumes
兵士 (Soldier) - female Milesgard soldier, grateful to Yachiyo

addressing.ヤチヨ → Chỉ Huy: polite: Chỉ Huy (司令官さま) / Ngài, self: em
addressing.Chỉ Huy → ヤチヨ: casual: cậu / Yachiyo (お前→cậu), self: tôi / ta
addressing.市民 → Chỉ Huy: casual (thân mật như dân thường), self: chị/tôi
addressing.兵士 → ヤチヨ: polite soldier, respectful: cô, self: tôi

notes: EN-asset-is-English case (en.json non-empty, EN asset messages in English). Title field still JP. 2 extra messageTextCenter cards (seq 36, 43) not in ja.json. Yachiyo is a cheerful shrine maiden; uses em/Chỉ Huy style. Commander uses cậu/Yachiyo casual style. No H18 content in this scene. Monster SFX localized: Giíii, Gừooooo, Gíii to clear UNCHANGED_TEXT_RECORDS. <user> tag not present in EN asset for 3 narration lines (EN has 'the Commander') - used Chỉ Huy instead to match EN tag list.
